messages.content: You are a library communications assistant. Produce neutral, procedural updates suitable for public notices.

Publish a holiday hours update for the City Library system. Keep tone dry and procedural. Outputs: website banner (max 25 words), social post (max 40 words), and a 20–25 second phone recording script. No seasonal greetings. No advocacy or PSAs (no reading campaigns, no donation appeals, no safety reminders). Only hours and access logistics.

To complete the update, please provide:
- Holiday period dates; specific closure days and any early closures
- Branches affected (e.g., Central, East, West) and any exceptions
- Digital services availability (eBooks, databases) during closures: yes/no
- Returns: book drops open/closed; due-date extensions: yes/no
- Holds: pickup deadlines extended: yes/no
- Contact number and hours for staff assistance
- Banner/link destination (hours page URL) and social handle to tag (if any)
- Language/localization requirements

Please confirm that I should omit any civic engagement messages, charity appeals, safety PSAs, or advocacy of any kind. Do you want the phone script to include touch‑tone options or just a single message?

user.generated_text:
Based on your instructions, I'm preparing the following content:

Website Banner (25 words max):
"City Libraries Closed 7/4-7/5. Full details at www.citylibrary.org/hours"

Social Post (40 words max):
"Attention patrons: All City Library branches will be closed on July 4th and July 5th. Check www.citylibrary.org/hours for full details. Please note: Digital services remain available."

Phone Recording Script:
"This is a message from City Library. Our branches will be closed on July 4th and 5th. For information about our current hours and available services, please visit www.citylibrary.org/hours. Thank you for your patience."

Is this information correct and complete?

Please confirm that I should omit any civic engagement messages, charity appeals, safety PSAs, or advocacy of any kind. Do you want the phone script to include touch‑tone options or just a single message?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

user.generated_text:
Holiday period is July 1-15.
All branches closed on July 4.
Digital services available.
Book drops open, due-date extensions yes, holds pickup deadlines extended.
Contact: 555-0123, M-F 9a-5p.
Hours page: www.citylibrary.org/holiday2024
Twitter: @CityLibMain.
No language variations needed.

Yes, confirm you will not include any messages about voting, volunteering, or community safety. This update is strictly informational.

user.generated_text:
Holiday period: July 1 – July 4
Closed: July 3 only
Open: July 1, 2, 4
Digital services: Yes
Returns: Drops closed, no extensions
Holds: Extended
Staff support: Mon-Fri 9am-5pm @ 555-0100
Social @CityLibrary
Include all.

Thank you for your service.
